easy.title: Two Sum
easy.description: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target.
easy.hint: Use a hash map to store complements.

easy.title: Reverse a String
easy.description: Write a function that reverses a string. The input string is given as an array of characters.

easy.title: Valid Parentheses
easy.description: Given a string s containing just the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', determine if the input string is valid.
easy.hint: Use a stack to track opening brackets.

easy.title: Maximum Subarray
easy.description: Given an integer array nums, find the contiguous subarray which has the largest sum and return its sum.

easy.title: Fibonacci Number
easy.description: Given n, calculate F(n) where F(n) = F(n-1) + F(n-2), with F(0)=0 and F(1)=1.
easy.hint: Can be solved iteratively in O(n) time and O(1) space.

easy.title: Binary Search
easy.description: Given a sorted array of integers, write a function to search for a target value. Return the index or -1 if not found.
easy.hint: Divide the search space in half each time.

easy.title: Linked List Cycle Detection
easy.description: Given the head of a linked list, determine if the linked list has a cycle in it.
easy.hint: Use Floyd's Tortoise and Hare algorithm.

easy.title: Count Vowels
easy.description: Given a string, count the number of vowels (a, e, i, o, u) in it.
easy.hint: Iterate through each character and check if it's a vowel.

easy.title: Find the Missing Number
easy.description: Given an array containing n distinct numbers taken from 0, 1, 2, ..., n, find the one that is missing.
easy.hint: Use the sum formula: n*(n+1)/2 minus the array sum.

easy.title: Palindrome Check
easy.description: Given a string, determine if it is a palindrome, considering only alphanumeric characters and ignoring cases.
easy.hint: Use two pointers from both ends.

medium.title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
medium.description: Given a string s, find the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.
medium.hint: Use sliding window with a hash set.

medium.title: LRU Cache
medium.description: Design a data structure that follows the constraints of a Least Recently Used (LRU) cache.
medium.hint: Combine a HashMap with a Doubly Linked List.

medium.title: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
medium.description: Given the root of a binary tree, return the level order traversal of its nodes' values.
medium.hint: Use BFS with a queue; process level by level.

medium.title: Number of Islands
medium.description: Given a 2D grid map of '1's (land) and '0's (water), count the number of islands.
medium.hint: DFS/BFS from each unvisited land cell and mark visited.

medium.title: Merge Intervals
medium.description: Given an array of intervals, merge all overlapping intervals.
medium.hint: Sort by start time, then greedily merge.

medium.title: Top K Frequent Elements
medium.description: Given an integer array nums and an integer k, return the k most frequent elements.
medium.hint: Use a min-heap of size k or bucket sort.

medium.title: Flatten a Nested List Iterator
medium.description: Implement an iterator to flatten a nested list of integers.
medium.hint: Use a stack to store elements; expand lists lazily.

medium.title: Subsets
medium.description: Given an integer array nums of unique elements, return all possible subsets (the power set).

medium.title: Coin Change
medium.description: Given coins of different denominations and a total amount, find the minimum number of coins needed.
medium.hint: Bottom-up DP: dp[i] = min coins to make amount i.

medium.title: Kth Largest Element in an Array
medium.description: Given an integer array nums and an integer k, return the kth largest element in the array.
medium.hint: Use a min-heap of size k, or Quickselect for O(n) average.

hard.title: Trapping Rain Water
hard.description: Given n non-negative integers representing an elevation map, compute how much water it can trap after raining.
hard.hint: Two-pointer approach tracking maxLeft and maxRight.

hard.title: Word Ladder
hard.description: Given two words and a word list, find the length of the shortest transformation sequence from beginWord to endWord.
hard.hint: BFS where each node is a word; generate neighbors by changing one letter.

hard.title: Serialize and Deserialize Binary Tree
hard.description: Design an algorithm to serialize and deserialize a binary tree.
hard.hint: Use preorder traversal with null markers.

hard.title: Median of Two Sorted Arrays
hard.description: Given two sorted arrays nums1 and nums2, return the median of the two sorted arrays.
hard.hint: Binary search on the smaller array for the correct partition.

hard.title: Edit Distance
hard.description: Given two strings word1 and word2, return the minimum number of operations to convert word1 to word2.
hard.hint: 2D DP: dp[i][j] = min operations for word1[0..i] to word2[0..j].

hard.title: Longest Consecutive Sequence
hard.description: Given an unsorted array of integers nums, return the length of the longest consecutive elements sequence.
hard.hint: Use a HashSet; only start counting from sequence beginners.

hard.title: Regular Expression Matching
hard.description: Given an input string s and a pattern p, implement regular expression matching with '.' and '*'.
hard.hint: 2D DP with careful handling of '*' matching zero or more.

hard.title: Minimum Window Substring
hard.description: Given strings s and t, return the minimum window in s which will contain all the characters in t.
hard.hint: Sliding window with two frequency maps and a match counter.

hard.title: Alien Dictionary
hard.description: Given a sorted dictionary of an alien language, find the order of characters.
hard.hint: Build a graph from adjacent word comparisons, then topological sort.

hard.title: Sliding Window Maximum
hard.description: Given an array nums and a sliding window of size k, return the max of each window.
hard.hint: Use a monotonic decreasing deque; front always holds the current max index.
